sourceReason: codex CLI not available in current environment; fixture schema used. Regenerate via `npm run codex:schema` once codex app-server is installed.

wireProtocolCalibration.noJsonrpcField: wire 上不发送 jsonrpc:2.0 字段（codex app-server 约定）
wireProtocolCalibration.initializeHandshake: 每个连接先 send initialize，再 notify initialized
wireProtocolCalibration.initializeParamsShape: params: { clientInfo: { name, title, version }, capabilities: { experimentalApi: bool } }（不再用 clientName/clientVersion 顶层）
wireProtocolCalibration.initializeResultShape: result: { userAgent, codexHome, platformFamily, platformOs }（旧 name/version/protocolVersion 保留兼容）
wireProtocolCalibration.threadStartParamsShape: params: { config: { model, sandboxPolicy, personality }, instructions, cwd }（config 容器）
wireProtocolCalibration.threadResumeForResume: thread/resume 用于恢复已有 threadId（不再把 resumeSessionId 塞进 thread/start）
wireProtocolCalibration.turnStartInputShape: content item array [{ type:'text', text }, { type:'image' }, { type:'file' }]
wireProtocolCalibration.turnStartedNotification: turn/started 通知：{ threadId, turn: { id } }
wireProtocolCalibration.itemNestedShape: item/started 与 item/completed 使用 nested params.item 结构（不再用 flat type/itemId 顶层）
wireProtocolCalibration.itemTextDeltaLegacyAlias: item/text/delta 仅作为 fixture legacy alias，不作为主路径
wireProtocolCalibration.approvalViaServerRequest: approval 走 server-initiated request（带 id），client 按原 id 返回 result
wireProtocolCalibration.serverRequestResolvedNotification: serverRequest/resolved 携带 requestId/threadId/turnId/itemId/decision，用于 UI 同步

notes: Official-schema-aligned fixture for V2.17-A Completion main-line closure.
Field names match codex app-server official docs (clientInfo/capabilities, nested params.item, item/agentMessage/delta, accept/decline decisions, thread/resume).
When codex is available, regenerate to replace this file entirely via `codex app-server generate-ts`.
Fixture tests verify official wire shape: initialize clientInfo+capabilities, item/agentMessage/delta drives finalAnswer, approval decision shape, thread/resume from BridgeSession.
All types are scoped to V2.17-A Bridge Core integration; provider-private, UI never imports these.
